session.user:
Run ruff linter on the changed files to check for lint errors. Do NOT fix any errors, just report results.
Run: ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py tests/commands/implement/test_issue_mode.py
Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff linter on those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linter on changed files

session.assistant:
ruff passed: No linting violations found in the checked files.
**Files checked:** - `src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py` - `tests/commands/implement/test_issue_mode.py`
**Result:** All checks passed!
